assertions.assertion: Client uses standard shared secret authentication (not certificate-based authentication)
assertions.rationale: Client uses ClientSecrets = { new Secret('hybrid_secret'.Sha256()) } — standard shared secret.

assertions.assertion: Explains that the cnf claim with x5t#S256 will be embedded in the access token
assertions.rationale: Response shows the cnf claim JSON with x5t#S256 and explains it's the SHA-256 thumbprint.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that the client must use a TLS client certificate when calling the token endpoint (even though the certificate is not used for authentication)
assertions.rationale: Response explicitly states 'the client must present a TLS client certificate when calling the token endpoint' and dedicates a section to this requirement.
